name: Onion Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Stick (1/2 cup) butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix quiche ingredients together thoroughly.
3. In a separate pan, sauté onions and any desired vegetables with 1 tablespoon butter until cooked.
4. Add caraway seeds to the sautéed mixture.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the vegetable mixture, stirring well to combine.
6. Grease a 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
7. Pour the quiche mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes to set the quiche.
9. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until fully cooked.
This version maintains the original recipe's title and core instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency in ingredient listing and preparation steps.
